title: Tilburg, North Brabant — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tilburg, North Brabant: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tilburg is a city in North Brabant with a population of 229,836. A former textile hub turned modern Brabant city with a growing creative sector, strong logistics industry, and a more affordable, laid-back lifestyle.

Last updated: July 08, 2026
